title: Move an Epic from the Roadmap Board (and its subitems) to a Sprint Group in the Sprints Board
excerpt: As a Project Manager I want to be able to select a Column from an Epic and move that Epic to another board within a particular Group (Sprint) so I do not have to manually send Epics from the Roadmap to the Sprints board …

posts.author: perrymcleod (Perry McLeod)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a Project Manager I want to be able to select a Column from an Epic and move that Epic to another board within a particular Group (Sprint) so I do not have to manually send Epics from the Roadmap to the Sprints board when we are ready to begin the work.

How can this be accomplished with the current version of monday?

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @perrymcleod

Welcome to the monday.com community.

I’m happy to take a look for you and see if that’s something I can assist with. Feel free to drop me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io or you can book straight into my calendar using the below link.

Chat with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: perrymcleod (Perry McLeod)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there what I really need help with right now is a few days extension on my trial. Can you help TODAY!!

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @perrymcleod

We’d be happy to extend the trial period for you! Could you please reach out to our support team at support@monday.com?

In regards to moving the item and subitems between Epics, this will depend on your board set up and the type of information you’re looking to move between boards.
Are you able to share some screenshots of your board setup? You can post them here or include them in an email to our support team, who can also assist!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: perrymcleod (Perry McLeod)
posts.cookedHtml: I was able to make my purchase. All is well. Thank you.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for letting us know!
Did you need assistance with anything else, or can we go ahead and close this thread?

Thanks!
Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @perrymcleod

I hope the answers in this thread are useful!
As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and close this thread.

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani
